script:
It is early.
The room is dark.

You swore last night you would ship the OATH v1 spec to GitHub and send Oliver the link before noon.
That is the commitment. It is still true.

Kobe Bryant was in the gym at 4am.
Not occasionally — every morning, before the building filled, before the cameras arrived, before anyone was watching.
Thousands of repetitions in an empty room.
By the time his opponents woke up, he had already done the work that made the outcome inevitable.

Trust the work.

Open the spec doc.
Write the wedge section.
Five minutes. That is all you are doing right now.
Not noon. Not GitHub. Not Oliver.
The wedge section.

Sixty minutes. Phone face down.

Begin.

Generate the OATH ritual script using:

mode: hardest_work
variant: hero_anchor_heavy
user's intent (the hardest task they swore last night they'd tackle this morning): "ship the OATH v1 spec to github and send Oliver the link before noon"
user's first action (what they'll do in the first 5 minutes): "open the spec doc and write the wedge section"
user's hero (reference by concrete habit, never by invented quote): Kobe Bryant
user's grounding phrase (use verbatim, do not paraphrase): "trust the work"
